author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Step 3 of Phase 1. Implementing autograd engine: GraphNode for topology tracking, backward() with Kahn's algorithm, no_grad() thread-local context, gradient checkpointing. Files: src/autograd/mod.rs, graph.rs, function.rs, no_grad.rs, checkpoint.rs. The GradFn trait is already defined in tensor.rs — function.rs will re-export it and add helpers.
